info.title: Close API
info.description: Close CRM REST API for managing leads, contacts, opportunities, tasks, activities, custom fields, and more. Uses industry-standard REST conventions with Basic authentication.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of leads.
Retrieve a single lead by ID.

put.description: Update an existing lead. Supports non-destructive patches.

post.description: Merge source lead into destination lead.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of contacts.
Retrieve a single contact by ID.

put.description: Update an existing contact. Supports non-destructive patches.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of opportunitys.
Retrieve a single opportunity by ID.

put.description: Update an existing opportunity. Supports non-destructive patches.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of tasks.

put.description: Update multiple tasks at once using filters.

get.description: Retrieve a single task by ID.

put.description: Update an existing task. Supports non-destructive patches.

get.description: List or filter all activity types.
List call activities.
List email activities.
List note activities.
List meeting activities.
List sms activities.
Returns all custom fields for leads.
Returns all custom fields for contacts.
Returns all custom fields for opportunities.
Returns all lead statuses.
Returns all opportunity statuses.
Returns the current API user info.
Returns all users in the organization.
Get a user by ID.
Returns organization info.

post.description: Search leads using advanced filtering syntax.

BasicAuth.description: Use your API key as the username and leave the password blank.
